pr.title: Record: Coprime-Stride Loader + Full GPTQ + XSA-all — val_bpb 1.1133 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines coprime-stride loader, full Hessian GPTQ with reduced reserve, and XSA on all layers plus a FlashAttention-3 fallback to squeeze extra steps.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training uses the full standard dataset; no validation-only regime was run.
techniques: Full Hessian GPTQ + Cholesky error compensation with shorter reserve
XSA on every layer with BigramHash/SmearGate and FA3/FA2 fallback
